---
title: "Regressions"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{}

```
### 1 Logistic regression

```{r}
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)


model_binary <- glm(
  outcome_binary ~ Exposure_Group + sex + study_visit_age + disease_duration +
    HY + yrs_education + living_environment + Farming + led,
  data    = Matched_data,
  family  = binomial
)

vc <- vcovCL(model_binary, cluster = Matched_data$subclass)
coeftest(model_binary, vcov. = vc)
```

### 2 Linear regression

```{r}
model_continuous <- lm(
  outcome_continuous ~ Exposure_Group + sex + study_visit_age + disease_duration +
    HY + yrs_education + living_environment + Farming + led,
  data = Matched_data
)

vc <- vcovCL(model_continuous, cluster = Matched_data$subclass)
coeftest(model_continuous, vcov. = vc)
```

### 3 Linear regression MDS-UPDRS Part III (adjusted for ON/OFF medication state)

```{r}
model_continuous_onmed <- lm(
  outcome_continuous ~ Exposure_Group + sex + study_visit_age + disease_duration +
    HY + yrs_education + living_environment + Farming + led + On_Med,
  data = Matched_data
)

vc <- vcovCL(model_continuous_onmed, cluster = Matched_data$subclass)
coeftest(model_continuous_onmed, vcov. = vc)
```

```



```{r}
